# modelblueprint

**modelblueprint** is a model-agnostic container for managing machine
learning model lifecycles in R. Wrap any
[`predict()`](https://rdrr.io/r/stats/predict.html)-compatible model —
`lm`, `glm`, XGBoost, H2O, and more — with its training data, pipeline
functions, and metadata, then run diagnostics with a single function
call.

## Installation

``` r

# Install from GitHub
pak::pak("mattyoreilly/modelblueprint")
```

## Overview

``` r

library(modelblueprint)

mb <- modelblueprint(
  model  = glm(vs ~ wt + hp, data = mtcars, family = binomial),
  train  = mtcars,
  y_name = "vs",
  expo_name          = "exposure",
  model_display_name = "logistic_vs"
)

# Predict
predict(mb, mtcars)

# One-way analysis — pulled directly from blueprint slots
one_way(mb, var = "wt")

# Partial dependence plot
pdp(mb, var = "wt")

# Gains chart with Gini coefficient
gain(mb)

# Calibration chart
pred_vs_obs(mb)

# Grouped residuals with loess trend
residuals_grouped(mb)

# Save and restore
saveMB(mb, path = "models/", filename = "logistic_vs")
mb2 <- loadMB("models/logistic_vs.tar.gz")
```

## Key features

- **Model-agnostic** — works with any R model implementing
  [`predict()`](https://rdrr.io/r/stats/predict.html), including H2O
- **Pipe-friendly** — [`filter()`](https://rdrr.io/r/stats/filter.html),
  `mutate()`, and `left_join()` methods return new blueprints
- **Diagnostic plots** — one-way, PDP, gains, calibration, and residual
  plots built in
- **Persistence** — save and restore full model pipelines including H2O
  models
- **S7 class system** — type-safe properties with informative validation
  errors

## Supported models

| Model | Package | Regression | Classification |
|----|----|----|----|
| Linear model | base R | ✓ | ✓ (LPM) |
| GLM (Gaussian, Binomial, Poisson) | base R | ✓ | ✓ |
| Decision tree | rpart | ✓ | ✓ |
| Random forest | randomForest | ✓ | ✓ |
| Gradient boosting | xgboost | ✓ | ✓ |
| H2O GLM / GBM / AutoML | h2o | ✓ | ✓ |
| Any [`predict()`](https://rdrr.io/r/stats/predict.html)-compatible model | — | ✓ | ✓ |

# Package index

## All functions

- [`modelblueprint`](https://matt-or.github.io/modelblueprint/reference/ModelBlueprint.md)
  : modelblueprint: a model-agnostic container for ML model lifecycles
- [`filter(`*`<modelblueprint>`*`)`](https://matt-or.github.io/modelblueprint/reference/filter.ModelBlueprint.md)
  : Filter rows in a modelblueprint's datasets
- [`gain()`](https://matt-or.github.io/modelblueprint/reference/gain.md)
  : Cumulative Gains Chart
- [`gain(`*`<default>`*`)`](https://matt-or.github.io/modelblueprint/reference/gain.default.md)
  : Cumulative Gains Chart (default method)
- [`left_join(`*`<modelblueprint>`*`)`](https://matt-or.github.io/modelblueprint/reference/left_join.ModelBlueprint.md)
  : Left-join into a modelblueprint's datasets
- [`loadMB()`](https://matt-or.github.io/modelblueprint/reference/loadMB.md)
  : Load a modelblueprint from disk
- [`mb_lm_regression()`](https://matt-or.github.io/modelblueprint/reference/mb_examples.md)
  [`mb_lm_classification()`](https://matt-or.github.io/modelblueprint/reference/mb_examples.md)
  [`mb_glm_regression()`](https://matt-or.github.io/modelblueprint/reference/mb_examples.md)
  [`mb_glm_binomial()`](https://matt-or.github.io/modelblueprint/reference/mb_examples.md)
  [`mb_glm_poisson()`](https://matt-or.github.io/modelblueprint/reference/mb_examples.md)
  [`mb_rpart_regression()`](https://matt-or.github.io/modelblueprint/reference/mb_examples.md)
  [`mb_rpart_classification()`](https://matt-or.github.io/modelblueprint/reference/mb_examples.md)
  [`mb_rf_regression()`](https://matt-or.github.io/modelblueprint/reference/mb_examples.md)
  [`mb_rf_classification()`](https://matt-or.github.io/modelblueprint/reference/mb_examples.md)
  [`mb_xgb_regression()`](https://matt-or.github.io/modelblueprint/reference/mb_examples.md)
  [`mb_xgb_classification()`](https://matt-or.github.io/modelblueprint/reference/mb_examples.md)
  [`mb_h2o_regression()`](https://matt-or.github.io/modelblueprint/reference/mb_examples.md)
  [`mb_h2o_classification()`](https://matt-or.github.io/modelblueprint/reference/mb_examples.md)
  : Example modelblueprint objects
- [`mutate(`*`<modelblueprint>`*`)`](https://matt-or.github.io/modelblueprint/reference/mutate.ModelBlueprint.md)
  : Mutate columns in a modelblueprint's datasets
- [`one_way(`*`<modelblueprint>`*`)`](https://matt-or.github.io/modelblueprint/reference/one_way.ModelBlueprint.md)
  : One-way analysis for a modelblueprint
- [`one_way()`](https://matt-or.github.io/modelblueprint/reference/one_way.md)
  : Create a one-way analysis plot
- [`pdp(`*`<modelblueprint>`*`)`](https://matt-or.github.io/modelblueprint/reference/pdp.ModelBlueprint.md)
  : Partial dependence plot for a modelblueprint
- [`pdp()`](https://matt-or.github.io/modelblueprint/reference/pdp.md) :
  Partial dependence plot for any predict()-compatible model
- [`pred_vs_obs()`](https://matt-or.github.io/modelblueprint/reference/pred_vs_obs.md)
  : Predicted vs Observed Calibration Plot
- [`predict(`*`<modelblueprint>`*`)`](https://matt-or.github.io/modelblueprint/reference/predict.ModelBlueprint.md)
  : Generate predictions from a modelblueprint
- [`residuals_grouped()`](https://matt-or.github.io/modelblueprint/reference/residuals_grouped.md)
  : Grouped Residuals vs Predicted Plot
- [`sami()`](https://matt-or.github.io/modelblueprint/reference/sami.md)
  : SAMI Double Lift Chart
- [`saveMB()`](https://matt-or.github.io/modelblueprint/reference/saveMB.md)
  : Save a modelblueprint to disk
- [`unitise()`](https://matt-or.github.io/modelblueprint/reference/unitise.md)
  : unitise a numeric variable to the range 0 to 1
